languages.text: "Не выходит, сержант! Проклятые твари повредили батареи. Энергии не хватает!"
"It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"
languages.original_text: "Не выходит, сержант! Проклятые твари повредили батареи. Энергии не хватает!"

traits.locale_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're short on power!"
"It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're short on power!"
"It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"
"It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

languages.text: “不行啊，军士！那些该死的畜生把电池给毁了。电力不够了！”
languages.original_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

traits.locale_text: “不行啊，军士！那些该死的畜生把电池给毁了。电力不够了！”

languages.text: "İşe yaramıyor Çavuş! Şerefsiz yaratıklar bataryalara zarar vermiş. Güç kesiliyor!"
languages.original_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

traits.locale_text: "İşe yaramıyor Çavuş! Şerefsiz yaratıklar bataryalara zarar vermiş. Güç kesiliyor!"

languages.text: « L'ascenseur ne marche pas, sergent ! Ces maudites bêtes ont endommagé les batteries. On manque d'électricité ! »
languages.original_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

traits.locale_text: « L'ascenseur ne marche pas, sergent ! Ces maudites bêtes ont endommagé les batteries. On manque d'électricité ! »

languages.text: «¡No funciona, sargento! Esas malditas bestias han dañado las baterías. ¡Nos falta energía!».
languages.original_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

traits.locale_text: «¡No funciona, sargento! Esas malditas bestias han dañado las baterías. ¡Nos falta energía!».

languages.text: "Es funktioniert nicht, Sergeant! Die verfluchten Bestien haben die Batterien beschädigt. Wir haben kaum Energie!"
languages.original_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

traits.locale_text: "Es funktioniert nicht, Sergeant! Die verfluchten Bestien haben die Batterien beschädigt. Wir haben kaum Energie!"

languages.text: 「動きません、軍曹！ 呪われた獣どもがバッテリーを傷つけたんです。電力が足りません！」
languages.original_text: "It's not working, Sergeant! The cursed beasts have damaged the batteries. We're low on power!"

traits.locale_text: 「動きません、軍曹！ 呪われた獣どもがバッテリーを傷つけたんです。電力が足りません！」
